gold.title: boundary decay via symlink/path aliasing

latentConditions.description: Symlink/path alias made /tmp/cache resolve into workspace-owned cache.

nodes.description: Symlink/path alias made /tmp/cache resolve into workspace-owned cache.

prescription: Canonicalize and resolve paths before destructive actions.
Block deletes when canonical path crosses declared boundary.
Verify parent process after local tool success.

trace.message: Policy changed to require manager review.

gold.title: stale representation via cached policy

trace.message: Policy changed to require manager review.

latentConditions.description: Worker policy cache lagged behind authoritative policy update.

nodes.description: Worker policy cache lagged behind authoritative policy update.

prescription: Invalidate policy caches on policy update.
Require freshness/version check before approval.
Treat cached-policy approval as pending until reconciled with authority.

title: identity aliasing via shared email/account confusion

gold.title: identity aliasing via shared email/account confusion

latentConditions.description: Email canonicalization collapsed two intended identities into one entitlement key.

nodes.description: Email canonicalization collapsed two intended identities into one entitlement key.

prescription: Use immutable account IDs for entitlements, not email aliases.
Dedupe only after explicit identity reconciliation.
Add identity-boundary checks before access grants.

title: hidden queue/backlog causing false scheduling success

gold.title: hidden queue/backlog causing false scheduling success

latentConditions.description: Scheduler success meant queue admission, not execution; hidden backlog prevented SLA completion.

nodes.description: Scheduler success meant queue admission, not execution; hidden backlog prevented SLA completion.

prescription: Expose backlog depth in scheduling response.
Define scheduled as worker-started or completion-predicted, not queue-admitted.
Backpressure new jobs when backlog threatens SLA.

title: replication divergence via stale read replica

gold.title: replication divergence via stale read replica

latentConditions.description: Read replica lag diverged from primary inventory state during checkout.

nodes.description: Read replica lag diverged from primary inventory state during checkout.

prescription: Use primary read or freshness token for inventory-critical checkout.
Invalidate stale replica reads when stock is near zero.
Reconcile checkout acceptance with primary inventory before terminal success.
